properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I feel the cold of winter And this cloak of sadness I need You All the evil things that shake me All the words that break me I need You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Over the mountains Over the sea Here You come running My Lover to me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Do not hide me from Your presence Pull me from these shadows I need You Beauty wrap Your arms around me Sing Your song of kindness I need You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh through the valleys Through the dark of night Here You come running To hold me until it’s light

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I’ll come running I’ll come running I’ll come running Back to You
